title: Memory Fact
description: Validates entries in the facts.json file within the private repository. Each fact represents a piece of verified knowledge stored in the agent's memory system.

fact.description: The factual statement or piece of knowledge to be stored in memory.

confidence.description: Confidence score for this fact, where 0 means unverified speculation and 1 means fully confirmed.

source.description: Origin of this fact (e.g., 'user-stated', 'observed', 'inferred', 'external-api', or a specific URL/reference).

date.description: ISO 8601 date when this fact was recorded or last verified.

verified.description: Whether this fact has been explicitly verified by the user or a trusted source.
